provenance_grades.A: Publicly documented location; coordinates and name verifiable in open sources (Wikipedia, news, public maps).
provenance_grades.B: Real area or terrain feature is publicly known; specific picket/post position within that area is illustrative.
provenance_grades.C: Generic designator; clearly synthetic. Used where real picket numbering is not public.

_meta.formation_disclaimer: Formation assignments reflect publicly documented divisional Areas of Responsibility (AORs). Brigade-level assignments are illustrative for demo purposes and do not represent classified ORBAT.

altitude_bands.extreme: >5000m  (~>16,400ft)  — air/foot resupply only in winter, extreme conditions

depots.name: Leh ASC Depot
depots.provenance_note: Leh is publicly the Army's main forward supply node for Ladakh.

depots.name: Karu Sub-Depot
depots.provenance_note: Karu is publicly the location of 3 Inf Div HQ.

depots.name: Hanle Sub-Depot
depots.provenance_note: Hanle is a publicly known forward locality with co-located civilian/military presence; specific sub-depot role is illustrative.

depots.name: Kargil Main Depot
depots.provenance_note: Kargil town is publicly known; Brigade HQ in this sector is publicly documented.

posts.name: DBO Base
posts.provenance_note: DBO/Daulat Beg Oldi is one of the most publicly documented forward locations in India. Airstrip and road link both confirmed in open sources.
posts.consumption_profile_hint: Highest extreme-altitude multipliers; air-resupply-dominant in winter.

posts.name: Murgo Sub-Base
posts.provenance_note: Murgo is the established staging point on the Shyok-DBO road, publicly documented.
posts.consumption_profile_hint: Transit camp; throughput-dominant rather than consumption-dominant.

posts.name: FOB Galwan
posts.provenance_note: Galwan valley is publicly known. Specific picket layout within the valley is illustrative and consistent with reported deployments.
posts.consumption_profile_hint: High-altitude band; access constrained by Shyok river crossings.

posts.name: PP-North-1
posts.provenance_note: Generic designator. Patrol points are numbered in real life but the specific numbering scheme and exact locations are not public.

posts.name: Chushul Garrison
posts.provenance_note: Chushul is a publicly known garrison location with documented road connectivity via Chang La.
posts.consumption_profile_hint: Larger establishment; serves as forward distribution point for Pangong-Chushul cluster.

posts.name: Rezang La OP
posts.provenance_note: Rezang La is publicly known (1962 battle memorial site).
posts.consumption_profile_hint: Small OP; high winter wear on equipment.

posts.name: Spanggur Gap
posts.provenance_note: Spanggur Gap is publicly named; specific picket layout is illustrative.

posts.name: Finger Area North-Bank OP
posts.provenance_note: Fingers 1-8 are publicly known terminology for the Pangong north-bank ridgelines. Specific OP position is illustrative.
posts.consumption_profile_hint: Lakeside terrain; access varies seasonally with lake ice.

posts.name: Hanle Forward Camp
posts.provenance_note: Hanle is publicly known; co-located with Indian Astronomical Observatory which serves as a public reference point.
posts.consumption_profile_hint: Co-located with sub-depot; throughput plus consumption.

posts.name: Demchok Picket
posts.provenance_note: Demchok is a publicly known disputed locality on the Indus.

posts.name: Loma Sub-Base
posts.provenance_note: Loma is on the Hanle-Demchok axis; specific transit/sub-base role is illustrative.

posts.name: Drass Garrison
posts.provenance_note: Drass is publicly known (Kargil War, second-coldest inhabited place globally).

posts.name: Kargil Sector HQ
posts.provenance_note: Kargil is publicly known; co-located with main depot for sector.
posts.consumption_profile_hint: Brigade HQ scale; throughput for entire western sector.

posts.name: Mushkoh Valley OP
posts.provenance_note: Mushkoh Valley is publicly known (Kargil War operations).
posts.consumption_profile_hint: Medium-altitude OP; foot-resupply for forward elements.

posts.name: Tiger Hill OP
posts.provenance_note: Tiger Hill is publicly known (Kargil War, Point 5062).
posts.consumption_profile_hint: Extreme altitude; foot/animal resupply for final approach.

loc_axes.name: Western LoC: Srinagar–Zoji La–Drass–Kargil–Leh
loc_axes.seasonal_pattern: Closed approx Dec-Apr, open May-Nov; closure timing weather-dependent
loc_axes.provenance_note: Srinagar-Leh highway and Zoji La pass are extensively publicly documented.

loc_axes.name: Southern LoC: Manali–Rohtang/Atal Tunnel–Baralacha La–Taglang La–Leh
loc_axes.seasonal_pattern: Open approx May-Oct only; multiple high passes
loc_axes.provenance_note: Manali-Leh highway is publicly documented; pass altitudes from public sources.

loc_axes.name: Air Bridge: Chandigarh/Hindon → Leh (KBR)
loc_axes.provenance_note: Kushok Bakula Rimpochee Airport (KBR/VILH) and Indian Air Force air bridge to Ladakh are publicly documented.
